text: mRNA is more fragile than you think. It carries essential instructions for our cells, but it breaks down easily. So how does it survive long enough to do its job? Enter lipid nanoparticles—a protective shell that keeps mRNA intact. They ensure mRNA reaches cells safely, letting them learn and adapt. Want to dive deeper into biotech? Hit follow for more insights!
